name: SOL Drawdown Forensic Diagnostic
scope: Research Lab diagnostic only. Analyze why frozen trial-00095 SOL transfer failed the standalone drawdown gate despite strong ER/PF/frequency and passing BTC+ETH+SOL portfolio gates. No entry tuning, threshold change, shadow design, PAPER deployment, or runtime change.
edge_rationale: SOL_TRIAL_00095_TRANSFER_FEASIBILITY_V1 showed strong transfer-like edge but failed the predeclared standalone max drawdown gate. The next safe step is to understand drawdown concentration and portfolio risk controls before deciding whether any SOL-specific risk-policy research is justified.
counterparty_or_market_mechanism: No new trading mechanism is tested. The milestone investigates the risk profile of the existing sweep/reclaim transfer mechanism on SOL.
required_data: Audited BTC, ETH, and SOL research datasets
frozen_assumptions: Trial-00095 entries, exits, sweep depth threshold, and non-risk parameters remain frozen.
Risk-cap sensitivity changes only offline portfolio signal risk sizing, not entry selection.
No SOL threshold tuning is allowed.
No runtime, shadow, PAPER, LIVE, core, orchestrator, settings, execution, or production storage changes are allowed.
Diagnostic outputs cannot approve SOL trading.
expected_observation: The diagnostic should identify whether SOL drawdown is concentrated in crash regimes, driven by long loss streaks, already mitigated by portfolio vetoes, or reducible by a smaller SOL risk cap without changing entries.

kill_criteria.runtime_change: Any runtime/core/settings/execution/storage production change invalidates the milestone.
kill_criteria.entry_tuning: Any SOL-specific entry, threshold, or exit tuning invalidates the diagnostic.
kill_criteria.source_db_mutation: Mutating audited BTC/ETH/SOL source datasets invalidates the milestone.
kill_criteria.promotion_claim: Any SOL shadow/PAPER/runtime approval claim invalidates the milestone.

failure_modes: Drawdown is distributed across all regimes rather than concentrated.
Smaller SOL risk caps do not reduce capital drawdown materially.
SOL signals overlap with BTC/ETH drawdown periods more than expected.
Portfolio vetoes improve headline metrics but do not control SOL-specific loss streaks.
Risk-cap sensitivity is misread as permission to tune entries.
out_of_scope: Changing core, orchestrator, settings, execution, risk, or production storage
author: Codex
